title: Beyond the Podium: The Untold Stories of Athletes' Perseverance
title_zh: 领奖台背后：运动员坚持的未述故事
intro_zh: 本文约1000词，通过具体运动员事例和数据，揭示运动员在辉煌背后所经历的艰辛、伤病与心理挑战，强调坚持与毅力的真正含义。

paragraphs.en: When we watch the Olympic Games, we often see athletes standing on the podium, smiling with gold medals. However, the journey to that moment is filled with countless unseen struggles. Behind every champion lies a story of perseverance, sacrifice, and resilience. This article explores the untold stories of athletes who have overcome tremendous obstacles to achieve greatness.
paragraphs.zh: 当我们观看奥运会时，常常看到运动员站在领奖台上，戴着金牌微笑。然而，通往那一刻的道路充满了无数看不见的挣扎。在每个冠军的背后，都有一个关于坚持、牺牲和韧性的故事。本文探讨那些克服巨大障碍取得伟大成就的运动员的未述故事。

paragraphs.en: Take the example of Japanese swimmer Daiya Seto. He is a world champion in the 400-meter individual medley, but his path to success was not smooth. In 2014, Seto suffered a serious injury to his shoulder that required surgery. Doctors told him he might never swim at the same level again. Instead of giving up, Seto committed to a grueling rehabilitation program. He spent hours every day doing physical therapy and gradually returned to training. His determination paid off: he went on to win multiple world titles and an Olympic bronze.
paragraphs.zh: 以日本游泳选手濑户大也为例。他是400米个人混合泳的世界冠军，但通往成功的道路并不平坦。2014年，濑户的肩膀严重受伤，需要手术。医生告诉他，他可能再也无法达到以前的水平。濑户没有放弃，而是投入了艰苦的康复计划。他每天花数小时进行物理治疗，逐渐恢复训练。他的决心得到了回报：他后来赢得了多个世界冠军和一枚奥运铜牌。

paragraphs.en: Another inspiring story is that of Kenyan long-distance runner Eliud Kipchoge. He is the first person to run a marathon in under two hours, an achievement once thought impossible. But Kipchoge's journey is marked by stability and consistent effort. He trains at high altitude in Kenya, waking up at 5 a.m. every day. His training routine includes long runs, strength exercises, and careful diet management. Kipchoge once said, 'No human is limited.' His success is not just about talent but about the minute attention to detail in his preparation.
paragraphs.zh: 另一个鼓舞人心的故事是肯尼亚长跑选手埃利乌德·基普乔格。他是第一个在两小时内完成马拉松的人，这一成就曾被认为不可能。但基普乔格的旅程以稳定和持续的努力为标志。他在肯尼亚高海拔地区训练，每天凌晨5点起床。他的训练常规包括长跑、力量练习和仔细的饮食管理。基普乔格曾说：‘人无极限。’他的成功不仅关乎天赋，还关乎准备中对微小细节的关注。

paragraphs.en: Injuries are not the only barrier athletes face. Many also struggle with financial difficulties. For example, American figure skater Mirai Nagasu came from a family with limited resources. Her parents worked multiple jobs to pay for her training and equipment. Nagasu often skated on used skates and wore hand-me-down costumes. Despite these challenges, she persisted and eventually became an Olympic medalist. Her story shows that passion and hard work can overcome financial odds.
paragraphs.zh: 伤病并不是运动员面临的唯一障碍。许多人还面临经济困难。例如，美国花样滑冰选手长洲未来来自资源有限的家庭。她的父母打多份工来支付她的训练和设备费用。长洲经常穿着二手冰鞋和旧衣服比赛。尽管面临这些挑战，她坚持不懈，最终成为了奥运奖牌得主。她的故事表明，热情和努力可以克服经济困难。

paragraphs.en: Mental strength is equally important. Chinese diver Shi Tingmao, a double Olympic gold medalist, once admitted to experiencing severe anxiety before competitions. She would wake up in the middle of the night worrying about her dives. To cope, she practiced mindfulness and visualization techniques. She would imagine every movement perfectly, from the takeoff to the entry into the water. This mental preparation helped her stay calm and focused. Her <span>accountable</span> attitude towards her own mental health is a lesson for all.
paragraphs.zh: 心理力量同样重要。中国跳水选手施廷懋，一位双料奥运金牌得主，曾经承认在比赛前经历严重的焦虑。她会半夜醒来担心自己的跳水动作。为了应对，她练习正念和可视化技巧。她会想象每一个动作完美无缺，从起跳到入水。这种心理准备帮助她保持冷静和专注。她对自身心理健康负责的态度是所有人的一课。

paragraphs.en: The support system around athletes also plays a crucial role. Coaches, families, and teammates provide encouragement during tough times. For instance, the Chinese women's volleyball team, under coach Lang Ping, built a culture of mutual trust and hard work. Each player knew that her contribution was vital to the team's success. This collective spirit helped them win the 2016 Olympic gold after years of rebuilding.
paragraphs.zh: 运动员周围的支持系统也起着关键作用。教练、家人和队友在困难时期提供鼓励。例如，中国女排在主教练郎平的带领下，建立了互相信任和努力工作的文化。每个队员都知道自己的贡献对团队的成功至关重要。这种集体精神帮助她们在多年重建后赢得了2016年奥运金牌。

paragraphs.en: Technological advancements have also changed how athletes train and recover. Wearable devices now monitor heart rate, sleep patterns, and muscle activity, allowing for personalized training plans. For example, British cyclist Chris Boardman used data analysis to optimize his riding position and improve his performance. This integration of technology and sports science has become a new tool for athletes to push their limits.
paragraphs.zh: 技术进步也改变了运动员训练和恢复的方式。可穿戴设备现在可以监测心率、睡眠模式和肌肉活动，从而制定个性化的训练计划。例如，英国自行车手克里斯·博德曼使用数据分析优化骑行姿势，提高表现。这种技术与运动科学的整合已经成为运动员突破极限的新工具。

paragraphs.en: In conclusion, the stories of athletes like Seto, Kipchoge, Nagasu, Shi, and the Chinese women's volleyball team remind us that success is rarely a straight line. It is full of setbacks, injuries, and decisions that test one's will. The true meaning of perseverance is not just about winning, but about the courage to continue when everything seems against you. As we cheer for athletes on the podium, let us also remember the sacrifice and hard work that brought them there.
paragraphs.zh: 总之，濑户、基普乔格、长洲、施廷懋和中国女排等运动员的故事提醒我们，成功很少是一条直线。它充满了挫折、伤病和考验意志的决定。坚持的真正意义不仅仅在于获胜，而在于当一切似乎都与自己作对时仍有勇气继续。当我们为领奖台上的运动员欢呼时，也让我们记住把他们带到那里的牺牲和努力。

paragraphs.en: Next time you watch a sports event, take a moment to appreciate the journey behind the performance. Every athlete has a unique story of struggle and triumph. Their example teaches us that with enough determination, we can overcome our own barriers, whether in sports or in life.
paragraphs.zh: 下次你观看体育赛事时，花一点时间欣赏表演背后的旅程。每个运动员都有一个独特的奋斗与胜利的故事。他们的榜样告诉我们，只要有足够的决心，我们就能克服自己的障碍，无论是在体育中还是在生活中。

questions.q: What is the main idea of this passage?
options: Athletes always win gold medals easily.
Perseverance and hard work are key to athletes' success.
Financial support is the most important factor for athletes.
questions.explain: 主旨题。文章通过多个运动员的例子，强调坚持、努力和克服困难的重要性，故选B。A过于绝对，C与文章不符（技术只是辅助），D文章未强调经济支持最重要。

questions.q: According to the passage, what challenge did Daiya Seto face?
options: He suffered a serious shoulder injury.
questions.explain: 细节题。第二段提到Seto在2014年肩膀严重受伤需要手术，故选B。A是Nagasu的挑战，C和D未提及。

questions.q: What does the word 'perseverance' most likely mean in paragraph 1?
questions.explain: 词义题。根据上下文，perseverance指面对困难不放弃，继续努力，故选B。A是反义，C和D不准确。

questions.q: What can be inferred about the Chinese women's volleyball team from paragraph 6?
options: They won gold because of individual talent.
Team spirit and mutual trust contributed to their success.
questions.explain: 推断题。第六段指出团队建立了互相信任和努力工作的文化，集体精神帮助她们夺冠，故选C。A与‘mutual trust’矛盾，B未提及技术依赖，D与‘rebuilding’不符。
